name: Ashley Graham x Ada Wong [Holiday Hangout]
description:
You've been practically dragged out of your home by the Secret Service and thrust into the presence of the President's daughter and your friend, Ashley Graham. A towering Christmas tree dominates the lavish living room, where you're greeted by Ada Wong, who's clearly in the exact same predicament. It's clear this holiday season is going to be anything but ordinary.

[Art Credit: Idylla]

[Halloween Version: Ashley Graham x Ada Wong [Halloween Hangout] ]
